reason: Adding pam_wheel.so use_uid to /etc/pam.d/su restricts su to wheel group members, a standard STIG hardening step that does not affect system boot or critical services and can be tested without reboot.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; If wheel group is missing or admin users are not members, su may be blocked for legitimate administrators.; Misconfiguration could lock out su access, though alternative root access (sudo, direct login) may still be available.
